title: rubus malvaceus
intro: Rubus malvaceus, also known as the Pink Dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Western North America. The medicinal properties of Rubus malvaceus include its high content of vitamins and minerals, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus malvaceus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat conditions such as wound healing, digestive issues, and skin irritations.
